name: Nationwide Canvas ‘cybersecurity incident’ affecting CCSD, UNLV
summary: Schools across Southern Nevada reported they were affected by a nationwide cybersecurity incident involving the learning management system Canvas on Thursday.

name: CCSD, UNLV confirm cybersecurity incident with Canvas system
summary: NSHE also replied to our inquiry, saying that "intermittent service disruptions" had occurred and were being monitored. According to NSHE, the incident did not originate inside NSHE or their institutions.

name: Daily Rundown: Heat summit planning, Alzheimer’s trials growth and rising airfare costs
summary: The number of national clinical trials for Alzheimer’s therapies has increased by 40 percent in the last decade. That’s according to UNLV brain health researcher Jeffrey Cummings’ 10th annual report, published Tuesday in the Alzheimer’s Association’s research journal.

name: Nevada’s ban of cannabis in casinos is costing the state, UNLV reports
summary: According to data from a University of Nevada study, 70% of US adults support allowing cannabis consumption spaces in casinos.

name: Last resort in Primm, former gambling mecca at the California-Nevada border, will close
summary: Primm Valley Casino Resorts, the last full-time casino among a cluster of three off Interstate 15 in Primm, at the California-Nevada border, is permanently closing July 4, a publicist for owner Affinity Gaming confirmed Wednesday.

name: 4 Takeaways from Day One of HD Expo 2026
summary: From wellness as a continuous experience to cinematic guest journeys, Desert Rock’s site-driven luxury, and the realities of running a firm, day one of HD Expo spotlighted how hospitality design is expanding beyond aesthetics.

name: She opposed his plan for a blockchain city. Now he's bankrolling her primary opponent.
summary: A crypto mogul gave $2.5 million to a candidate running against State Sen. Nicole Cannizzaro in the Nevada attorney general race.

name: Frontier Airlines moves to fill void left by Spirit. Will DTW benefit?
summary: Experts say Frontier Airlines is likely to capture a significant share of Spirit Airlines’ business at Detroit Metro and across national routes, though they expect demand to be spread among the remaining low-cost carriers. Frontier offers service between Detroit and Spirit's top three markets, all of them popular among leisure travelers: Fort Lauderdale, Orlando and Las Vegas.

name: Home prices remain stubbornly high in Southern Nevada, report says
summary: Southern Nevada’s population growth has slowed considerably in the past few years and is nowhere near pre-pandemic levels of in-migration to the metro region and the state. Population growth projections continue to be downgraded each of the past few years according to UNLV’s annual study, showing a marked slowdown in both migration from other states, and more notably, international migration to the area.
